intent.one_sentence: Cold ocean cliff meets hot foundry runoff at dusk.
intent.art_goal: Prove water, lava, wet stone, metal, sparks, smoke, and tinted dusk lighting in one intentional exterior composition.

foreground_midground_background.foreground: Wet basalt ledge, safety rail, and ocean spray.
foreground_midground_background.midground: Foundry channel with contained lava, metal supports, and ember particles.
foreground_midground_background.background: Ocean horizon, cliff wall, and warm industrial silhouette.

lighting.key: Low warm sun from rear-left grazing wet stone.
lighting.fill: Cool ocean sky fill from camera-right.
lighting.rim: Lava and furnace emissive on rail edges and smoke.
lighting.fog: Salt mist over water plus warmer smoke over foundry channel.

cameras.role: Read the full ocean-to-foundry story with clear foreground, midground, and background.
cameras.art_reason: Low diagonal angle keeps rail attachments visible and frames the lava channel against ocean fill.

cameras.role: Wet basalt, chrome rail, lava crust, and water reflection response.
cameras.art_reason: Close enough to judge shader separation without losing the rail/contact construction.

cameras.role: Sparks, smoke, colored fog, and dusk silhouettes.
cameras.art_reason: Looks back through particles toward the warm source and cool sky edge.

material_palette.description: Dark wet rock with roughness breakup and cool sky reflection.
Worn dark metal rails with warm lava rim highlights.
Contained liquid emissive with crust islands and bloom ceiling.
Blue-green water plane with reflected dusk sky.

assets.art_reason: Large grounded scan breaks up the cliff edge and gives the waterline scale.
Central lava path is physically contained by attached trough walls.
Rail explicitly runs parallel to the trough and is mounted by posts, avoiding the old floating-bar look.

authored_groups.art_reason: The lava container is a built object with walls, supports, lip, drain, and rail attachments.
Grounded rocks and wet ledges create natural contact from waterline to foundry floor.
Particles and fog reinforce hot/cold contrast without becoming random decoration.

seeded_random_groups.art_reason: Secondary contact detail only; not the primary composition.
